name: reverse_ref_single
query: query BenchReverseRefSingle($categoryId: ItemId!) { category(id: $categoryId) { id name _allReferencingPosts(first: 20, orderBy: [title_ASC]) { id title slug } } }

name: reverse_ref_wide
query: query BenchReverseRefWide($categoryId: ItemId!) { category(id: $categoryId) { id name _allReferencingPosts(first: 80, orderBy: [title_ASC]) { id title slug excerpt publishedDate author { id name } } } }

name: reverse_ref_all_categories
query: query BenchReverseRefAllCategories { allCategories { id name _allReferencingPosts(first: 10, orderBy: [publishedDate_DESC]) { id title slug } } }

name: deep_with_links
query: query BenchDeepWithLinks($first: Int) { allPosts(first: $first, orderBy: [publishedDate_DESC]) { id title slug content { value blocks { __typename ... on HeroSectionRecord { id headline subheadline } ... on CodeBlockRecord { id language filename code } ... on FeatureGridRecord { id heading features { value blocks { __typename ... on FeatureCardRecord { id title description details { value blocks { __typename ... on CodeBlockRecord { id language filename code } } } } } } } ... on FeatureCardRecord { id title description details { value blocks { __typename ... on CodeBlockRecord { id language filename code } } } } } } category { id name slug } author { id name bio } } }

name: page_with_reverse_refs
query: query BenchPageWithReverseRefs($categoryId: ItemId!, $first: Int) { siteSettings { siteName tagline } category(id: $categoryId) { id name description _allReferencingPosts(first: $first, orderBy: [publishedDate_DESC]) { id title slug excerpt publishedDate author { name } } } _allPostsMeta { count } }

name: multi_category_reverse_refs
query: query BenchMultiCategoryReverseRefs { allCategories { id name slug _allReferencingPosts(first: 5) { id title slug author { name } } } }

name: single_post_deep_yoga
query: query BenchSinglePostDeep($slug: String!) { post(filter: { slug: { eq: $slug } }) { id title slug excerpt publishedDate readingTime featured content { value blocks { __typename ... on HeroSectionRecord { id headline subheadline } ... on CodeBlockRecord { id language filename code } ... on FeatureGridRecord { id heading features { value blocks { __typename ... on FeatureCardRecord { id title description details { value blocks { __typename ... on CodeBlockRecord { id language filename code } } } } } } } } } category { id name slug } author { id name bio } } }

name: list_summary_with_meta
query: query BenchListSummaryMeta($first: Int) { allPosts(first: $first, orderBy: [publishedDate_DESC]) { id title slug excerpt publishedDate category { name slug } author { name } } _allPostsMeta { count } }
